recommended_actions_7d: Monitor network traffic for suspicious activity
title: AryStinger Botnet
summary: [P1] The AryStinger botnet has infected thousands of D-Link routers worldwide, allowing attackers to gain control over the devices. The botnet is actively exploited in the wild, and a patch is not currently available for all affected devices. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): Unknown (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: The AryStinger botnet infects D-Link routers, which are network devices, and allows for remote code execution.
